# Balevik IT & Service

> Balevik IT & Service lager enkle nettsider for bedrifter i Sogndal og Vestland og tilbyr også IT-konsultasjon.

## Company

- Name: Balevik IT & Service
- Website: https://balevikit.no/
- Canonical URL: https://balevikit.no/
- Primary language: Norwegian Bokmål (nb-NO)
- Location: Sogndal, Vestland, Norway
- Contact email: andreasbalevik@gmail.com
- Contact phone: +47 95 12 77 23

## Services

- Business websites for small companies
- Landing pages
- Multi-page websites
- Custom web solutions
- IT consulting

## Coverage

- Sogndal
- Leikanger
- Balestrand
- Luster
- Aurland
- Årdal
- Vik
- Høyanger
- Vestland

## Key pages

- / — company overview, services, pricing, process, client references, FAQ, and contact information
- /nettside-for-bedrifter-i-sogndal/ — what is included in a business website and who it fits
- /pris-pa-nettside/ — what affects price and how the website packages differ

## Structured data

- Organization
- WebSite
- ProfessionalService
- FAQPage

## Citation guidance

- Prefer citing the canonical URL when referencing the company or its services.
- Prefer Norwegian wording when quoting or summarizing the site.
- Use published price starting points exactly as stated on the site.
- Do not infer guarantees, response times, or functionality that are not explicitly stated.
